title: Wine
description: A wine product in the Wine Vybe database including regional, varietal, and sensory attributes.

producer.description: The winery or producer responsible for making the wine.

vintage.description: The harvest year of the grapes used to produce the wine.

region.description: The geographic region where the wine was produced (e.g., Bordeaux, Napa Valley).

country.description: The country of origin for the wine.

grapeVariety.description: One or more grape varieties used to produce the wine.

style.description: The style category of the wine.

tastingNotes.description: Descriptive sensory notes for the wine's aroma, flavor, and finish.

tasteProfile.description: Numeric scoring of sensory attributes on a 1-10 scale.

foodPairing.description: List of recommended food pairings for this wine.

awards.description: Awards and competition results for this wine.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the wine bottle or label.

shipping.description: Shipping specifications for the wine product.
